comment: Kamin (1969) blocking: A pretrained with US, then AX compound with same US; test X alone.
input: Blocking(phase1 = Pair.ForwardDelay(a, shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), phase2 = Pair.ForwardDelay(Compound([a, x]), shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), test = Extinction(x), phase1_trials = 40, phase2_trials = 20, test_trials = 10)
